title: CI/CD Parity Matrix
summary: Cross-project CI/CD maturity comparison: ship.ps1, agent:verify, git-guard, CI on PR, Jules QA, n8n Active Handover, Coolify deploy, semantic release, Docker/GHCR, E2E tests, self-healing pipeline. IronForge 8/10, Taktpinne 6/10 (after stabilization), Matlogistik 1/10, WarRoom 2/10. Used by /manager assess.
